packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time
explicit_request: Summarize the recurring human needs behind the April 19 ThirdPerson intervention packet without widening beyond the seeded scope.

needs.label: Default-lane truthful proof
needs.description: The human needs regression claims, screenshots, and closeout proof to stay anchored to the repo-defined human default lane instead of automation-only or non-default surrogates.

needs.label: Persistent ownership and continuity
needs.description: The human needs the system to keep working under its own ownership, resume dropped work without prompting, and avoid offloading intermediate failure back to the human.

needs.label: Direct answer discipline
needs.description: The human needs explicit questions answered directly, briefly, and in the requested shape without evasion, deflection, or unnecessary reframing.

needs.label: Approval-ready review surface
needs.description: The human needs plan and pass changes presented with diffs, links, and enough context to approve them quickly instead of reconstructing the state by hand.

needs.label: Root-cause debugging discipline
needs.description: The human needs the system to follow the first-disagreement, repo-local debugging method rather than bounded tweaks, surface polish, or symptom-only adjustments.

needs.label: Durable constraint retention
needs.description: The human needs new constraints, local wording rules, and pass-structure decisions to become durable state immediately so they do not need to be restated.

suffering_signals.label: time loss and repeated correction
suffering_signals.basis: OBSERVED repeated messages about wasted time, repeated fixes, and reopening after claimed closure.

suffering_signals.label: trust erosion from invalid proof
suffering_signals.basis: OBSERVED rejection of screenshots, non-default evidence, and unsupported closure claims.

suffering_signals.label: approval friction
suffering_signals.basis: OBSERVED complaints that diffs, links, and pass visibility were missing or unusable.

suffering_signals.label: supervision burden
suffering_signals.basis: INFERRED from repeated wake-up, ownership, and keep-working directives.

clarifying_question.reason: The packet already converges on recurring failure modes without a blocking ambiguity.

risk_notes: One authoritative source session is transcript_surface=missing, so packet understanding for those events stays closer to source-packet text than full transcript context.
Repo-local constraints were loaded from the current ThirdPerson docs on disk; those docs may be slightly newer than the packet day itself.
